hero_title: Compliance Control Layer for Digital Assets
hero_subtitle: SFTY connects multiple compliance providers into one operational workflow that normalizes outputs, routes reviews, preserves evidence, and supports audit-ready case management for VASPs.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance slows when providers stay disconnected
problem_description: Digital asset compliance teams struggle with manual reviews and duplicated checks due to fragmented provider outputs. This disconnect makes it difficult to maintain a consistent audit trail and slows operational workflows across KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule processes.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule provider data into one normalized, rules-driven workflow that routes reviews, creates cases and preserves audit evidence for efficient compliance operations.
workflow_title: Provider outputs flow into compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY connects and normalizes multiple provider checks, applies internal rules, routes reviews, opens cases, records decisions, preserves evidence and supports reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another provider. The vendor-neutral layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects diverse provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases, and audit-ready evidence without requiring replacement of existing compliance tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs needing a controlled layer to unify provider outputs, preserve audit evidence and enable enterprise-ready deployment with secure governance from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a compliance control layer for VASPs by connecting KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions, evidence and reports.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage multi-provider workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes and routes outputs from multiple providers into consistent reviews, applies internal rules, opens cases, and manages decision logs and escalation across compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, audit logs, decision records and evidence packages to maintain a clear, reviewable and defensible compliance trail for regulatory and internal audits.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is designed to sit above existing compliance providers and tools, integrating their outputs without replacing them while supporting configurable roles and access controls.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYT, Travel Rule or screening providers but connects their outputs into one connected operational compliance layer for better control and visibility.
final_title: Connect provider outputs into controlled workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule results into structured cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
